                /* 370宽度要减去boder */
                width: 368px;
                /* 200高度也要减去boder */
                height: 198px;
                line-height: 198px;
                margin-right: 10px;
            }
            .content {
                /* 内容区外边距离菜单 */
                margin-top: 10px;
            }
            .item3,.item4,.item5,.item6{
                border: 1px solid black;
                width: 178px;
                height: 198px;
                /* 每个栏目都设置右边距 */
                margin-right: 10px;
                line-height:198px;
            }
            .bottom{
                margin-top: 10px;
            }
            .item7,.item8,.item9{
                border: 1px solid black;
                width: 198px;
                height: 128px;
            }
            .item8{
                /* 上下10，左右0 */
                margin:10px 0;
            }
            .footer{
                margin-top: 10px;
                height: 60px;
                background-color: #ccc;
                line-height: 60px;
            }
        </style>
    </head>
    <body>
        <div class="container">
            <!-- 头部 -->
            <div class="page-header clearfix">
                <div class="logo leftfix">log</div>
                <div class="banner1 leftfix">banner1</div>
                <div class="banner2 leftfix">banner2</div>
            </div>
            <!-- 菜单 -->
             <div class="menu">菜单</div>
             <!-- 内容区 -->
              <div class="content clearfix" >
                <!-- 左侧 -->
                <div class="left leftfix">
                    <div class="top clearfix">
                        <div class="item1 leftfix">栏目一</div>
                        <div class="item2 leftfix">栏目二</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bottom clearfix">
                        <div class="item3 leftfix">栏目三</div>
                        <div class="item4 leftfix">栏目四</div>
                        <div class="item5 leftfix">栏目五</div>
                        <div class="item6 leftfix">栏目六</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- 右侧 -->
                <div class="right leftfix">
                    <div class="item7">栏目七</div>
                    <div class="item8">栏目八</div>
                    <div class="item9">栏目九</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <!-- 页脚 -->
               <div class="footer">页脚</div>
        </div>
    </body>
</html>

清除浮动

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
    <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <style>
            .outer{
                width:500px;
                background-color: gray;
                border: 1px solid black;
            }
            .box{
                width: 200px;
                height: 200px;
                background-color: skyblue;
                margin: 10px;
            }
           .box1{ 
                /* float: right; */
                /* box1浮上来，box2盒子顶上去，但是2的文字要环绕box1，所以2的文字与box3的文本重叠 */
                float: left;
            } 
        </style>
    </head>
    <body>
        <div class="outer">
            <div class="box box1">1</div>
            <div class="box box2">2</div>
            <div class="box box3">3</div>
        </div>
    </body>
</html>

定位

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
    <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8"></meta>
        <title>定位层级</title>
        <style>
            .outer{
                width: 500px;
                background-color: skyblue;
                border: 1px solid black;
                padding: 20px;
                /* 给一个定位属性：作为box3的包含块：作为box3的第一个拥有position属性的祖先元素*/
                position: relative;
                /* 图层z轴高于box5 */
                z-index: 2;
            }
            .box{
                width: 200px;
                height: 200px;
                font-size: 20px;
            }
            .box1{
                background-color: #666;
            }
            
            .box2{
                background-color: orange;
                /* 相对定位：不会脱离文档流 */
                position: relative;
                top: -150px;
                left: 50px;
            }
            .box3{
                background-color: green;
                /* 绝对定位：脱离文档流
                    包含块：第一个拥有position属性的祖先元素作为参考，若都没有则为html元素
                */
                position: absolute;
                top:130px;
                left:130px;
            }
            .box4{
                background-color: red;
                /* 固定定位 : 脱离文档流
                    参考视口
                */
                position: fixed;
                top: 200px;
                left: 200px;
            }
            .box5{
                background-color: purple;
                position: fixed;
                top: 300px;
                left: 300px;
                z-index: 1;
            }

            
        </style>
    </head>
    <body>
        <div class="outer">
            <div class="box box1">1</div>
            <div class="box box2">2</div>
            <div class="box box3">3</div>
            <div class="box box4">4</div>
        </div>
        <div class="box box5">5</div>
    </body>
</html>

定位的应用

撑满包含块

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
    <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8"></meta>
     	<title>撑满包含块</title>
        <style>
            .outer{
                height: 400px;
                background-color: #888;
                /* 给一个定位属性：作为inner的包含块：作为inner的第一个拥有position属性的祖先元素*/
                position: relative;
            }
            .inner{
                background-color: orange;
                font-size: 20px;
                padding: 20px;
                border: 10px solid black;
                /* 绝对定位：
                    脱离文档流
                    包含块：第一个拥有position属性的祖先元素作为参考，若都没有则为html元素
                */
                position:absolute;

                /* 撑满整个包含块 */
                top: 0;
                bottom: 0;
                left: 0;
                right: 0;
            }
        </style>
    </head>
    <body>
        <div class="outer">
            <div class="inner">我爱你</div>
        </div>
    </body>
</html>

居中-在包含块里

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title></title>
    <style>
        .outer {
            background-color: grey;
            width: 1000px;
            height: 900px;
            /* 给一个定位属性：作为inner的包含块：作为inner的第一个拥有position属性的祖先元素*/
            position: relative;

        }
        .inner {
            background-color: skyblue;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border: 1px solid black;

            /* 在包含块里居中 */
            /* 绝对定位：
                 脱离文档流
                 包含块：第一个拥有position属性的祖先元素作为参考，若都没有则为html元素
             */
            position:absolute;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            margin: auto;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="outer">
    <div class="inner inner1"></div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

页面Demo

reset.css

/* 基础设置 */
body,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6,hr,p,blockquote,dl,dt,dd,ul,ol,li,pre,form,fieldset,legend,button,input,textarea,th,td{
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

ul,ol {
  list-style: none;
}

img {
  /* 底部留白 */
  display: block;
border:0;
}

b,strong {
  font-weight: 400;
}

h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6 {
  /* 父元素字号的百分比 */
  font-size: 100%;
  font-weight: normal;
}

i,em {
  /* 不倾斜 */
  font-style: normal;
}

u,ins,s,del {
  /* 去掉中划线和下划线 */
  text-decoration: none;
}

table {
  border: 1px solid #999;
  /* 相当于是cellspacing */
  border-spacing: 0;
  /* 1px边框 */
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

td,th {
  border: 1px solid #999;
}

input,button {
  /* 去掉轮廓线 */
  outline: none;
  border:none;
}

/* 风格设置 */
body {
  font: 12px/1.5 "Microsoft YaHei", Tahoma, Helvetica, Arial, "\5b8b\4f53", sans-serif;
  color: #333;
}

a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #666;
}

a:hover {
  color:#DD302D;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.leftfix {
  float: left;
}

.rightfix {
  float: right;
}

/* 元素选择器: 在指定元素最后的位置创建一个空子元素*/
.clearfix::after{
  content: "";
  display: block;
  clear: both;
}

index.html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <!-- 兼容IE -->
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
    <!-- 配置移动端 -->
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <!-- 要求搜索爬虫不索引此页面 -->
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
    <meta name="description" content="Tao's Blog">
    <meta name="author" content="Tao">
    <title>千裳集</title>
    <!--  页签图标-->
    <link rel="shortcut icon" href="./img/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon">
    <!-- 重置样式 -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/reset.css"></link>
    <!-- 页面样式 -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/index.css"></link>
</head>
<body>
<!-- 顶部导航条 -->
<div class="topbar">
    <!-- 版心 -->
    <div class="container clearfix">
        <!-- 左侧欢迎区 -->
        <div class="welcome leftfix">
            <span class="hello">千裳集欢迎您</span>
            <span>请</span>
            <a href="#" class="login">登录</a>
            <a href="#" class="register">免费注册</a>
        </div>
        <!-- 右侧导航区 -->
        <div class="topbar-nav rightfix">
            <ul class="list clearfix">
                <li><a href="#">我的订单</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">我的购物车</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">我的千裳集</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">千裳集会员</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">企业采购</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">关注千裳集</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">合作招商</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">商家后台</a></li>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>

</div>
<!--头部-->
<div class="header">
    <div class="container clearfix">
        <!--        左侧logo区-->
        <div class="logo leftfix">
            <img src="./img/logo.png" alt="logo">
        </div>
        <!--        右侧搜索区-->
        <div class="search rightfix">
            <form action="#">
                <input type="text">
                <button></button>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<!--主导航-->
<div class="main-nav">
    <div class="container clearfix">
        <div class="all-types leftfix">全部商品分类</div>
        <ul class="main-nav-list leftfix">
            <li><a href="#">千裳集周边</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">优惠卷</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">PLUS会员</a></li>
        </ul>
    </div>
</div>
<!-- 主要内容区-->
<div class="main-content">
    <div class="container clearfix">
        <ul class="slide-nav leftfix">
            <li>
                <!--                一级菜单-->
                <a href="#">古风仙侠类</a>
                <!--                二级菜单-->
                <div class="second-menu">
                    <!--                    自定义列表-->
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                </div>
            </li>
            <li><a href="#">国风汉服类</a>
                <div class="second-menu">
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">国风汉服类</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                </div>
            </li>
            <li><a href="#">动漫cos类</a>
                <div class="second-menu">
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">动漫cos</a></dt>

                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>

                        <dt><a href="#">现代礼服</a></dt>

        <div class="banner leftfix">

        </div>
        <div class="slide-other  leftfix">
            <div class="message">
                <div class="title clearfix">
                    <span class="leftfix">快报</span>

                <ul class="msg-list">
                    <li><a href="#">发财</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">发疯</a></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div class="other-nav">
                <ul class="other-nav-list clearfix">
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>话费</span>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>火车票</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>加油卡</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>礼品卡</span></li>
                </ul>
                <ul class="other-nav-list clearfix">
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>

                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>火车票</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>加油卡</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>礼品卡</span></li>
                </ul>

                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>火车票</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>加油卡</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>礼品卡</span></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<!-- 秒杀区-->
<div class="kill">
    <div class="container ">
        <img src="img/banner1.jpg" alt="">
        <img src="img/banner2.jpg" alt="">
        <img src="./img/banner3.jpg" alt="">
        <img src="./img/banner4.jpg" alt="">
        <span>X</span>
    </div>
</div>
<!--楼层-->
<div class="floor">
    <div class="container">
        <!--        上部分-->
        <div class="floor-nav clearfix">
            <span class="floor-name leftfix clearfix">家用电器</span>
            <ul class="floor-nav-list rightfix">
                <li>
                    <a href="#">热门</a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="#">生活电器</a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="#">厨房电器</a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </div>
        <!--        下部分-->
        <div class="floor-info clearfix">
            <div class="item item1">
                <ul class="item1-list clearfix" >
                    <li><a href="#">节能补贴</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">4K电视</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">节能补贴</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">4K电视</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">节能补贴</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">4K电视</a></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div class="item item2">
                <img src="./img/loli.jpg" alt="">
            </div>
            <div class="item item3">3</div>
            <div class="item item4">4</div>
            <div class="item item5">5</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<!--页脚-->
<div class="footer">
    <div class="container">
<!--        顶部连接-->
        <div class="top-links clearfix">
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>

        </div>
<!--        分割线-->
        <div class="line"></div>
<!--        底部连接-->
        <div class="bottom-links">
            <ul class="bottom-links-list clearfix">
                <li><a href="#">关于我们</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">联系我们</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">合作招商</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">友情链接</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">隐式政策</a></li>
            </ul>
            <div class="copyright">&copy;2025 Tao 版权所有</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

indexdemo1.html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <!-- 兼容IE -->
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
    <!-- 配置移动端 -->
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <!-- 要求搜索爬虫不索引此页面 -->
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
    <meta name="description" content="Tao's Blog">
    <meta name="author" content="Tao">
    <title>千裳集</title>
    <!--  页签图标-->
    <link rel="shortcut icon" href="./img/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon">
    <!-- 重置样式 -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/reset.css"></link>
    <!-- 页面样式 -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/index.css"></link>
</head>
<body>
<!-- 顶部导航条 -->
<div class="topbar">
    <!-- 版心 -->
    <div class="container clearfix">
        <!-- 左侧欢迎区 -->
        <div class="welcome leftfix">
            <span class="hello">千裳集欢迎您</span>
            <span>请</span>
            <a href="#" class="login">登录</a>
            <a href="#" class="register">免费注册</a>
        </div>
        <!-- 右侧导航区 -->
        <div class="topbar-nav rightfix">
            <ul class="list clearfix">
                <li><a href="#">我的订单</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">我的购物车</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">我的千裳集</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">千裳集会员</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">企业采购</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">关注千裳集</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">合作招商</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">商家后台</a></li>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>

</div>
<!--头部-->
<div class="header">
    <div class="container clearfix">
        <!--        左侧logo区-->
        <div class="logo leftfix">
            <div class="mask">
                大牛
            </div>
            <img src="./img/logo.png" alt="logo">
        </div>
        <!--        右侧搜索区-->
        <div class="search rightfix">
            <form action="#">
                <input type="text">
                <button></button>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<!--主导航-->
<div class="main-nav">
    <div class="container clearfix">
        <div class="all-types leftfix">全部商品分类</div>
        <ul class="main-nav-list leftfix">
            <li><a href="#">千裳集周边</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">优惠卷</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">PLUS会员</a></li>
        </ul>
    </div>
</div>
<!-- 主要内容区-->
<div class="main-content">
    <div class="container clearfix">
        <ul class="slide-nav leftfix">
            <li>
                <!--                一级菜单-->
                <a href="#">古风仙侠类</a>
                <!--                二级菜单-->
                <div class="second-menu">
                    <!--                    自定义列表-->
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                </div>
            </li>
            <li><a href="#">国风汉服类</a>
                <div class="second-menu">
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">国风汉服类</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                </div>
            </li>
            <li><a href="#">动漫cos类</a>
                <div class="second-menu">
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">动漫cos</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                </div>
            </li>
            <li><a href="#">Lolita类</a>
                <div class="second-menu">
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">Lolita</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                </div>
            </li>
            <li><a href="#">现代礼服类</a>
                <div class="second-menu">
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">现代礼服</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                    <dl class="clearfix">
                        <dt><a href="#">仙侠</a></dt>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠长袍</a></dd>
                        <dd><a href="#">仙侠披风</a></dd>
                    </dl>
                </div>
            </li>
        </ul>
        <div class="banner leftfix">
            <img src="./img/banner主图.png" alt="banner主图">
        </div>
        <div class="slide-other  leftfix">
            <div class="message">
                <div class="title clearfix">
                    <span class="leftfix">快报</span>
                    <a href="#" class="rightfix">更多&nbsp;&gt;</a>
                </div>
                <ul class="msg-list">
                    <li><a href="#">发财</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">发疯</a></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div class="other-nav">
                <ul class="other-nav-list clearfix">
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>话费</span>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>火车票</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>加油卡</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>礼品卡</span></li>
                </ul>
                <ul class="other-nav-list clearfix">
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>话费</span>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>火车票</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>加油卡</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>礼品卡</span></li>
                </ul>

                <ul class="other-nav-list clearfix">
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>话费</span>
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>火车票</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>加油卡</span></li>
                    <li>
                        <div class="picture"></div>
                        <span>礼品卡</span></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<!-- 秒杀区-->
<div class="kill">
    <div class="container ">
        <img src="img/banner1.jpg" alt="">
        <img src="img/banner2.jpg" alt="">
        <img src="./img/banner3.jpg" alt="">
        <img src="./img/banner4.jpg" alt="">
        <span>X</span>
    </div>
</div>
<!--楼层-->
<div class="floor">
    <div class="container">
        <!--        上部分-->
        <div class="floor-nav clearfix">
            <span class="floor-name leftfix clearfix">家用电器</span>
            <ul class="floor-nav-list rightfix">
                <li>
                    <a href="#">热门</a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="#">生活电器</a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="#">厨房电器</a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </div>
        <!--        下部分-->
        <div class="floor-info clearfix">
            <div class="item item1">
                <ul class="item1-list clearfix" >
                    <li><a href="#">节能补贴</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">4K电视</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">节能补贴</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">4K电视</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">节能补贴</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#">4K电视</a></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div class="item item2">
                <img src="./img/loli.jpg" alt="">
            </div>
            <div class="item item3">3</div>
            <div class="item item4">4</div>
            <div class="item item5">5</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<!--页脚-->
<div class="footer">
    <div class="container">
<!--        顶部连接-->
        <div class="top-links clearfix">
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>
            <ul class="links-list ">
                <li><a href="#">购物指南</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">购物流程</a></li>
            </ul>

        </div>
<!--        分割线-->
        <div class="line"></div>
<!--        底部连接-->
        <div class="bottom-links">
            <ul class="bottom-links-list clearfix">
                <li><a href="#">关于我们</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">联系我们</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">合作招商</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">友情链接</a></li>
                <li><a href="#">隐式政策</a></li>
            </ul>
            <div class="copyright">&copy;2025 Tao 版权所有</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

index.css

/* 基础设置 */
.container{
    /* 版心由内容撑开，不需要设置高度 */
    width: 1190px;
    /* 版心居中 */
    margin: 0 auto;
    /* height: 100px;
    background-color: red; */
}
/* #region 顶部导航条start */
.topbar{
    height: 30px;
    background-color: #ececec;
}
.welcome{
    height: 30px;
    /* 行内元素可以像文本一样处理居中 */
    line-height: 30px;
    color: #666;
    /* 删除文字换行导致的空格，后面用选择器单独设置文字大小 */
    font-size: 0;
}
.welcome span,.welcome a{
    font-size: 12px;
}
.welcome .hello{
    margin-right: 28px;
}
.welcome .login{
    border-right: 1px solid #666;
    padding-right: 10px;
    /*background-color: orange;*/
}
.welcome .register{
    padding-left: 10px;
}
.topbar-nav .list li{
    float: left;
}
.topbar-nav .list{
    height: 30px;
    line-height: 30px;
}
.topbar .list li a{
    /*background-color: orange;*/
    border-right:  1px solid #666;
    /* 上下内边距0，左右内边距15 */
    padding: 0 15px;
}
.topbar-nav .list li:first-child a{
    padding-left: 0;
}
.topbar-nav .list li:last-child a{
    padding-right: 0;
    border-right: 0;
}
/* #endregion顶部导航条end */

/* #region 头部start */
.header .container{
    /*background-color: skyblue;*/
}
.header .logo{
    position: relative;
}
@keyframes p1 {
    from{}
    to{
        opacity: 1;
    }
}
.header .logo img {
    width: 190px;
    height: 190px;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    opacity: 0;
}
.logo:hover img{
    /*图片显示出来*/
    opacity: 1;
    /*动画*/
    /*animation: p1 0.5s 1s linear forwards;*/
}
.logo img{
    /*0.5秒线性过度效果**/
    transition: 0.5s linear all;
}
.logo .mask{
    width: 190px;
    height: 190px;
    color: white;
    font-size: 50px;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 190px;
    background-color: black;
}
.header .search input {
    /*background-color: red;*/
    width: 508px;
    height: 34px;
    border: 1px solid #DD302D;
}
.header .search button {
    width: 80px;
    height: 36px;
    background-color: #DD302D;
    /*使元素的顶部与所在行的顶部对齐*/
    vertical-align: top;
    /*    背景图 */
    background-image: url("../img/serch_icon.png");
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-position: 28px 6px;
}
.header .search form {
    margin-top: 42px;
    /*    去掉换行导致的空格
    */
    font-size: 0;
}
/* #region 头部end */
.main-nav {
    height: 48px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #DD302D;
}
/* #region 主导航start */
.main-nav .all-types {
    background-color: #DD302D;
    width: 190px;
    height: 48px;
    line-height: 48px;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
}
.main-nav .main-nav-list li{
    /*background-color: orange;*/
    float: left;
    height: 48px;
    line-height: 48px;
    margin: 0 10px;
    font-size: 16px;
}
/* #region 主要内容区start */
.main-content .slide-nav {
    width: 190px;
    height: 458px;
    background-color: #F4F4F4;
    /* 给一个定位属性：作为.second-menu的包含块：作为.second-menu的第一个拥有position属性的祖先元素*/
    position: relative;
}
.main-content .slide-nav li{
    height: 28px;
    line-height: 28px;
    font-size: 14px;
    padding-left: 16px;
}
.main-content .slide-nav li:hover{
    /*注意背景色不填充margin*/
    background-color: #DD302D;

}
.main-content .slide-nav li:hover .second-menu{
    display: block;
}
.main-content .slide-nav li:hover>a{
    /* 已经重置了a标签的样式，这些样式会覆盖从父元素继承过来的样式。*/
    color: white;
}
.second-menu {
    width: 680px;
    height: 458px;
    left: 190px;
    top:0;
    /*background-color: skyblue;*/
    background-image: url("../img/bk.png") ;
    /*opacity: 0.5; !* 设置透明度为50% *!*/
    /*绝对定位,用.slide-nav作为参考
        定位可以越过pading
    */
    position: absolute;
    padding-left: 20px;
    display: none;
}
.second-menu dl:first-child{
    margin-top: 10px;
}
.second-menu dl {
    height: 36px;
    line-height: 36px;
}
.second-menu dt{
    float: left;
    width: 70px;
    font-weight: bold;
    margin-right: 10px;
}
.second-menu dd{
    float: left;
    /*background-color: cornflowerblue;*/
}
.second-menu dd a{
    padding: 0 10px;
    border-left: 1px solid #666;
}
.main-content{
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.main-content .banner {
    width: 690px;
    height: 460px;
    background-color: green;
    margin:0 10px;
}

.main-content .slide-other {
    width: 290px;
    height: 458px;
    /*background-color: orange;*/
}
.slide-other .message{
    width: 260px;
    height: 156px;
    border: 1px solid #D9D9D9;
    padding: 0 14px;
}
.slide-other .message .title {
    height: 38px;
    line-height: 38px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #D9D9D9;
}
.slide-other .message .title span{
    font-size: 14px;
}
.slide-other .msg-list li{
    height: 26px;
    line-height: 26px;
}
.slide-other .other-nav {
    margin-top: 10px;
    width: 290px;
    height: 290px;
    /*background-color: grey;*/
    /*解决margin塌陷*/
    overflow: hidden;
}
.other-nav ul{
    /*background-color: skyblue;*/
}
.other-nav ul:first-child{
    margin-top: 16px;
}
.other-nav ul:nth-child(2){
    margin: 17px 0;
}

.other-nav-list li {
    width: 48px;
    height: 70px;
    /*background-color: orange;*/
    float: left;
    margin: 0px 11px;
    text-align: center;
    cursor: pointer;
}
.other-nav-list li:first-child{
    margin-left: 16px;
}
.other-nav-list .picture {
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    background-image: url("../img/精灵图-侧边功能.png");
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(1) li:nth-child(1) .picture{
    background-position: 0 0;
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(1) li:nth-child(2) .picture{
    background-position: -48px 0;
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(1) li:nth-child(3) .picture{
    background-position: -96px 0;
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(1) li:nth-child(4) .picture{
    background-position: -144px 0;
}

.other-nav-list:nth-child(2) li:nth-child(1) .picture{
    background-position: 0 -48px;
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(2) li:nth-child(2) .picture{
    background-position: -48px -48px;
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(2) li:nth-child(3) .picture{
    background-position: -96px -48px;
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(2) li:nth-child(4) .picture{
    background-position: -144px -48px;
}

.other-nav-list:nth-child(3) li:nth-child(1) .picture{
    background-position: 0 -96px;
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(3) li:nth-child(2) .picture{
    background-position: -48px -96px;
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(3) li:nth-child(3) .picture{
    background-position: -96px -96px;
}
.other-nav-list:nth-child(3) li:nth-child(4) .picture{
    background-position: -144px -96px;
}
/* #region主要内容区end  */

/* #region秒杀区start  */
.kill {
    /*height: 90px;*/
    /*line-height: 90px;*/
    margin-top: 10px;
    /*background-color: purple;*/
    /*text-align: center;*/
    font-size: 0;

}
.kill .container {
    /*多列布局*/
    column-count: 4;
    /*列边距*/
    column-gap: 10px;
    /*列间的边框*/
    column-rule: 1px dotted green;
}
.kill img:hover{
    box-shadow: 0px 0px 20px black;
    /*过度*/
    transition: all 0.2s linear;
    /*缩放变换*/
    transform: scale(1.1);
}
.kill img {
    /*width: 200px;*/
    /*占满column列宽*/
    width: 100%;
    /*margin-right: 10px;*/
    cursor: pointer;
    /*使图片受 text-align 属性的影响。*/
    /*display: inline-block;*/
}
/* #region秒杀区end  */


/* #region楼层区start  */
.floor{
    margin-top: 10px;
    background-color: grey;
}
.floor-nav {
    background-color: orange;
    height: 30px;
    line-height: 30px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid red;
}
.floor-nav .floor-name{
    font-size: 20px;
}
.floor-nav-list li {
    float: left;
    font-size: 14px;
}
.floor-nav-list li a{
    padding: 0 10px;
    border-right: 1px solid #666;
}
.floor-nav-list li:first-child a{
    padding-left: 0 ;
}
.floor-nav-list li:last-child a{
    border-right: 0 ;
}
.floor-info .item{
    float: left;
}
.item1{
    background-color: #F4F4F4;
    width: 198px;
    height: 198px;
    padding: 20px;
}

.item1-list li {
    background-color: orange;
    width: 90px;
    height: 22px;
    font-size: 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #D9D9D9;
    /*padding-bottom: 3.5px;*/
    text-align: center;
}
.item1-list li:nth-child(2n-1){
    /*奇数左浮动*/
    float: left;
}
.item1-list li:nth-child(2n){
    /*偶数左浮动*/
    float: right;
}
.item1-list li:nth-child(3),.item1-list li:nth-child(4){
    margin: 10px 0;
}
.item2{
    background-color: green;
    width: 238px;
    height: 238px;
    position: relative;
}
.item2 img{
    width: 238px;
    height: 238px;
    /* 撑满整个包含块 */
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    position:absolute;
}
.item3{
    background-color: orange;
    width: 238px;
    height: 238px;
}
.item4{
    background-color: gray;
    width: 238px;
    height: 238px;
}
.item5{
    background-color: tomato;
    width: 238px;
    height: 238px;
}
/* #region楼层区end  */

/* #region页脚start  */
.footer{
    background-color: #483E3E;
    height: 440px;
    margin-top: 10px;
}
.footer .links-list {
    background-color: orange;
    float: left;
    width: 190px;
    height: 176px;
    margin-top: 48px;
    margin-right: 10px;
    /*text-align: center;*/
}
.footer .links-list:last-child{
    /*background-color: red;*/
    margin-right: 0;
}
.footer .links-list a{
    color: white;
}
.line {
    height: 1px;
    background-color: white;
    margin-top: 22px;
}
.bottom-links{
    background-color: hotpink;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 47px;
}
.bottom-links-list{
    /*使ul受 text-align 属性的影响。*/
    display: inline-block;
}
.bottom-links-list li{
    float: left;
}
.bottom-links-list li a{
    border-right: 1px solid white;
    padding: 0 26px;
    color: white;
}
.bottom-links-list li:first-child a{
    padding-left: 0;
}
.bottom-links-list li:last-child a{
    border-right: 0;
}
.copyright{
    color: white;
    margin-top: 10px;
}
/* #region页脚区end  */

H5

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>新增标签</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!--状态标签-->
    <div>
        <span>米</span>
        <meter min="0" max="100" value="9" low="10" high="20" optimum="90"></meter>
        <meter min="0" max="100" value="19" low="10" high="20" optimum="90"></meter>
        <meter min="0" max="100" value="21" low="10" high="20" optimum="90"></meter>
        <span>进度条</span>
        <progress max="100" value="50"></progress>
    </div>
    <!--列表标签-->
    <div>
        <form action="#">
            <input type="text" list="mydata">
            <button>搜索</button>
        </form>
        <datalist id="mydata">
            <option value="11">11</option>
            <option value="12">12</option>
            <option value="21">21</option>
            <option value="22">22</option>
            <option value="31">31</option>
        </datalist>
    </div>
    <div>
        <details>
            <summary>总结概要</summary>
            欢迎来到英雄联盟
        </details>
    </div>
    <!--文字标签-->
    <div>
        <!--    注音-->
        <ruby>爱
            <rt>ai</rt>
        </ruby>
        <br>
        <span>我<mark>爱</mark>你</span>
    </div>
<!--表单控件属性-->
    <div>
<!--        pattern 配合 required 使用-->
<!--        <form action="#" novalidate 不校验表单>-->
        <form action="#" >
            账号:
            <input
                    type="text"
                    name="account"
                    placeholder="占位字符"
                    autofocus
                    aria-autocomplete="on"
                    required
                    pattern="\w{6}"
                >
            <br>
            密码:
            <input type="password" name="pwd" >
            <br>
            邮箱:
            <input type="email" name="youxiang" >
            <br>
            网站:
            <input type="url" name="wangzhang" >
            <br>
            数值:
            <input type="number" name="shuzhi" step="2" max="100" min="60" >
            <br>
            电话:
            <input type="tel" name="dianhua"  >
            <br>
            搜索:
            <input type="search" name="keyword">
            <br>
            光照强度:
            <input type="range" name="range" max="100" min="60" value="90">
            <br>
            颜色:
            <input type="color" name="color" >
            <br>
            日期:
            <input type="date" name="date">
            <br>
            月份:
            <input type="month" name="month">
            <br>
            周:
            <input type="week" name="week">
            <br>
            时间:
            <input type="time" name="time">
            <br>
            日期+时间:
            <input type="datetime-local" name="time2">
            <br>
            性别:
            <input type="radio" name="gender" value="男" required>
            <input type="radio" name="gender" value="女">
            <br>
            爱好:
            <input type="checkbox" name="hobby" value="sing" checked>唱
            <input type="checkbox" name="hobby" value="dance">跳
            <input type="checkbox" name="hobby" value="rap" required>rap
            <br>
            其他:
            <textarea name="other"  cols="5" rows="5" required></textarea>
            <br>
            <button>提交</button>
        </form>
    </div>
    <hr>
    <!--        媒体标签-->
    <div>
        <video src="./video/1.mp4" controls  muted autoplay loop preload="metadata">
            您的浏览器不支持视频播放
        </video>
        <audio src="./video/1.mp3" controls autoplay loop preload="metadata">
            您的浏览器不支持音频播放
        </audio>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

新增语义化标签

状态标签

列表标签

文本标签

表单控件

多媒体标签

全局属性

H5兼容性

css3

长度属性

box-sizing

resize

box-shadow

box-shadow: 0px 0px 20px black;

opacity

background

background-origin

background-clip

background-size

边框圆角border-radius

边框外轮廓outline

文本text-shadow

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Title</title>
  <style>
    body{
      background-color: black;
    }
    h1 {
      color: white;
      font-size: 80px;
      text-align: center;
      text-shadow: 0px 0px 20px red;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <h1>你好呀</h1>
</body>
</html>

文本换行white-space

文本溢出text-overflow

文本修饰text-decoration

文本描边

渐变gradient

  • 线性渐变
  • 径向渐变
  • 重复渐变
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Title</title>
  <style>
      .box1 {
        width: 600px;
        height: 800px;
        /*background-color:orange ;*/
        margin: 0 auto;
        border: 1px solid black;
        padding: 20px;
        /*  线性渐变*/
        background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(transparent 0px,transparent 29px,grey 30px);
        /*背景色会填充padding，所以要剪掉内容区背景*/
        background-clip: content-box;
      }
      .box2{
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        /*半径为父元素的一半*/
        border-radius: 50%;
        /*background-color: orange;*/
        background-image: radial-gradient(at 80px 80px,white,black);
      }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="box1"></div>
  <div class="box2"></div>
</body>
</html>

web字体

字体图标

2D变换位移transform

缩放scale

旋转rotate

扭曲skew

多重变换

变换原点transform-origin

3d变换景深perspective

透视点位置perspective-origin

3D位移

3d旋转

3d缩放

3d多重变换

过度transition

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Title</title>
  <style>
    .outer{
        width: 200px;
        /*background-color: grey;*/
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
    }
    .outer:hover .mask{
        opacity: 0.5;
    }
    .mask {
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        background-color: black;
        color: white;
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 100px;
        opacity: 0;
    /*    过度所有能过度的属性，1秒线性过度效果*/
        transition: 1s linear all;
        cursor: pointer;
    }
    img{
        width: 200px;
        height: 200px;
        vertical-align: bottom;
        /*0.5秒线性过度效果**/
        transition: 0.5s linear all;
    }
    .outer:hover img{
        transform: scale(1.5) rotate(20deg);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="outer">
        <img src="../img/logo.png" alt="">
        <div class="mask">深圳</div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

动画animation

动画与过度

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
    <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <title>动画不需要触发条件，可以通过关键字精确控制。过度需要触发条件，从始到末不可操作</title>
        <style>
            .lin{
               width: 100%;
               height: 1px;
               background: #000;
            }
            .outer{
               width: 1000px;
               height: 201px;
               border: 1px solid #000;
            }
            .inner-animation{
               width: 100px;
               height: 100px;
               background: skyblue;
               animation: demo2;
               /* 动画持续时间 */
               animation-duration: 3s;
               /* 动画延迟 */
               animation-delay: 1s;
               /* 动画播放次数 */
               /* animation-iteration-count: infinite; */
               /* 动画播放方向 */
               /* animation-direction: alternate; */
               /* 动画播放速度 */
               /* animation-timing-function: linear; */
               /* 不发生动画的时候在哪里 */
               animation-fill-mode: forwards;
               /* 复合写法 */
               /* animation: demo2 3s 1s linear  infinite alternate forwards; */
            }
            .outer:hover .inner-animation{
                /* 动画播放状态 */
               animation-play-state: paused;              
            }
            /* 定义关键帧 */
            @keyframes demo{
                /* 第一帧 */
                from{
                               
                }
                /* 最后帧 */
                to{
                       transform: translate(900px,0);           
                }
            }
            @keyframes demo2{
                0%{
                    transform:rotate(90deg)
                }
                50%{
                    background-color: red;
                }
                100%{
                    transform:  translate(900px,0);
                    border-radius:  50%;
                    background-color: green;
                }
            }
            .inner-transition{
               width: 100px;
               height: 100px;
               background-color: orange;
               transition: all 3s linear;
            }
            .outer:hover .inner-transition{
                transform: translate(900px,0);
                background-color: red;
            }
        </style>
    </head>
    <body>
        <div class="outer">
            <div class="inner-animation"></div>
            <div class="lin"></div>
            <div class="inner-transition"></div>
        </div>
    </body>
</html>

case-logo用过度效果

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>过度效果</title>
    <style>
        .logo {
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo img {
            width: 190px;
            height: 190px;
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        .logo:hover img {
            /*图片显示出来*/
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .logo img {
            /*0.5秒线性过度效果**/
            transition: 0.5s linear all;
        }

        .logo .mask {
            width: 190px;
            height: 190px;
            color: white;
            font-size: 50px;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 190px;
            background-color: black;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="logo ">
    <div class="mask">
        大牛
    </div>
    <img src="../img/logo.png" alt="logo">
</div>
</body>
</html>

case-logo用动画效果

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>动画效果</title>
    <style>
        .logo {
            position: relative;
        }
        @keyframes p1 {
            from{}
            to{
                opacity: 1;
            }
        }
        .logo img {
            width: 190px;
            height: 190px;
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            opacity: 0;
        }

        .logo:hover img{
            /*动画*/
            animation: p1 0.5s 1s linear forwards;
        }

        .logo .mask {
            width: 190px;
            height: 190px;
            color: white;
            font-size: 50px;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 190px;
            background-color: black;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="logo ">
    <div class="mask">
        大牛
    </div>
    <img src="../img/logo.png" alt="logo">
</div>
</body>
</html>

case-图片动画效果

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>动画效果</title>
    <style>
        @keyframes p1 {
            from{
            }
            to{
                background-position: 0 -123px;
            }
        }
        .logo{
            background-color: grey;
            position: relative;
        }
        .logo .mask1 {
            width: 190px;
            height: 123px;
            background-image: url("../img/animation.jpg");
            /*等比缩放*/
            background-size: cover;
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            opacity: 0;
        }
        .logo:hover .mask1{
            opacity: 1;
            transition: 0.5s linear all;
            /*steps(图片高度/指定宽度)*/
            animation: p1 1s  steps(50) infinite;
        }
        .logo .mask0 {
            width: 190px;
            line-height: 123px;
            height: 123px;
            font-size: 50px;
            background-color: black;
            color: white;
            text-align: center;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="logo ">
    <div class="mask mask0">大牛</div>
    <div class="mask mask1"></div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

case-flex布局

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title></title>
    <style>
       * {
           font-family: Arial;
           font-size: 14px;
           margin: 0;
           padding: 0;
           border:none;
       }
       a{
           text-decoration: none;
       }
       ul{
           list-style: none;
       }
       html, body{
           width: 100%;
           height: 100%;
       }
       body {
           /*background-image: url("../img/background.png");*/
           background-repeat: no-repeat;
           /*按比例盖住*/
           background-size: cover;
       }
       .page-header {
           height: 70px;
           background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
           display: flex;
           /*主轴方向两端对齐*/
           justify-content: space-between;
           /*侧轴方向居中对齐*/
           align-items: center;
           padding: 0 20px;
       }
       .header-nav {
           display: flex;
       }
       .header-nav li a {
           color: white;
           font-size: 20px;
           border: 1px solid white;
           border-radius: 8px;
           padding: 10px;
           margin-right: 20px;
       }
       .header-nav li:last-child a{
           margin-right: 0;
       }
       .page-content{
           display: flex;
           /*视口高度-header高度*/
           height: calc(100vh - 70px);
       }
       .content-nav {
           width: 1000px;
           height: 300px;
           background-color: skyblue;
           margin: auto;
           display: flex;
           justify-content: space-evenly;
           align-items: center;
       }
       .content-nav .item:hover{
           box-shadow: 0px 0px 20px black;
       }
       .content-nav .item {
           width: 180px;
           height: 200px;
           background-color: orange;
           display: flex;
           /*主轴方向从上到下*/
           flex-direction: column;
           /*align-items: center;*/
           justify-content: space-evenly;
           /*     过度效果*/
           transition: all 0.2s linear;
           cursor: pointer;

       }
       .content-nav .item img{
           align-items: center;
       }
       .content-nav .item span{
           font-size: 20px;
       }
       span{
           background-color: red;
       }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <header class="page-header">
        <a href="#">
            <img src="../img/logo1.png" alt="">
        </a>
        <ul class="header-nav">
            <li><a href="#">欧美</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">日本</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">缅甸</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">非洲</a></li>
        </ul>
    </header>
    <!--    内容区-->
    <div class="page-content">
        <div class="content-nav">
            <div class="item">
                <img src="../img/banner1.jpg" alt="">
                <span>X1</span>
            </div>
            <div class="item">
                <img src="../img/banner2.jpg" alt="">
                <span>X2</span>
            </div>
            <div class="item">
                <img src="../img/banner3.jpg" alt="">
                <span>X3</span>
            </div>
            <div class="item">
                <img src="../img/banner4.jpg" alt="">
                <span>X4</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

多列布局column

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>给图片增加过度和变换</title>
    <style>
        .container{
            /* 版心由内容撑开，不需要设置高度 */
            width: 1190px;
            /* 版心居中 */
            margin: 0 auto;
            background-color: grey;
        }
        .kill {
            margin-top: 10px;
            font-size: 0;

        }
        .kill .container {
            /*多列布局*/
            column-count: 4;
            /*列边距*/
            column-gap: 10px;
            /*列间的边框*/
            column-rule: 10px dotted green;
        }
        .kill img:hover{
            box-shadow: 0px 0px 20px black;
            /*过度*/
            transition: all 0.2s linear;
            /*缩放变换*/
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }
        .kill img {
            /*占满column列宽*/
            width: 100%;
            cursor: pointer;
            /*图片由行内块元素（宽高可以通过CSS调整且不占满整行）变为块元素（占整行）占满整列，
            否则当图片不足以填满一列的高度时，浏览器会自动将剩余的内容移到下一行，从而导致图片换行*/
            display: block;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="kill">
    <div class="container ">
        <img src="../img/banner1.jpg" alt="">
        <img src="../img/banner2.jpg" alt="">
        <img src="../img/banner3.jpg" alt="">
        <img src="../img/banner4.jpg" alt="">
    </div>

</div>
</body>
</html>

元素的显示模式display

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>display</title>
    <style>
        .outer {
            background-color: grey;
            /*每块砖在墙中都占据一个独立的空间，砖块可以根据CSS切割成不同的尺寸*/
            /*display: block;*/
            /*就像单词在句子中并排排列，多个 inline 元素可以在同一行内并排显示，你不能改变单个单词的高度或宽度*/
            /*display: inline;*/
            /*就像图片或图标在句子中与其他文字并排排列，你可以明确指定图片或图标的大小*/
            /*display: inline-block;*/
            /* 占据整个行宽，独立的智能大货架 是一个占据整个行宽的大型货架，它可以动态调整布局，决定如何排列和对齐上面的商品（弹性项目）。它会独占一行，并且其内部的商品可以根据需要灵活排列。*/
            /*display: flex;*/
            /*不独占一行，句子中的智能小货架 是一个小货架，它可以像单词一样在句子中流动，与其他文本或行内元素并排显示*/
            display: inline-flex;
        }
        .inner{
            box-sizing: border-box;/*设置盒子大小*/
            width: 100px;
            height: 100px;
            border:1px solid black;
            background-color: skyblue;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="outer">
    <div class="inner inner1"></div>
    <div class="inner inner2"></div>
</div>
XX
</body>
</html>

弹性盒子flex

flex-direction主轴方向

主轴换行flex-wrap

换行复合flex-flow

主轴对齐方式justify-content

侧轴单行对齐align-items

侧轴多行对齐align-content

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title></title>
    <style>
        .outer {
            background-color: grey;
            width: 1000px;
            height: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            display: flex;
            /*主轴换行*/
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            /*主轴默认从左到右*/
            flex-direction: row;
             /*主轴默认对齐方式*/
            justify-content: flex-start;
            /*侧轴单行对齐方式默认stretch拉伸,当items没有设置高度时*/
            /*align-items: stretch;*/
            /*侧轴多行对齐方式stretch拉伸,当items没有设置高度时*/
            align-content: stretch;
        }
        .inner{
            background-color: skyblue;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            /*调整盒子的总宽高*/
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border:1px solid black;
        }
        .inner2{
            height: 300px;
        }
        .inner3{
            height: 100px;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="outer">
    <div class="inner inner1"></div>
    <div class="inner inner2"></div>
    <div class="inner inner3"></div>
    <div class="inner inner4"></div>
    <div class="inner inner5"></div>
    <div class="inner inner6"></div>
    <div class="inner inner7"></div>
    <div class="inner inner8"></div>
    <div class="inner inner9"></div>
    <div class="inner inner10"></div>
    <div class="inner inner11"></div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

水平垂直居中-方法一flex轴居中

/*方法一：在父容器中设置以下属性*/
/*开启弹性盒子*/
display: flex;
/*主轴居中*/
justify-content: center;
/*    侧轴单行居中*/
align-items: center;
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title></title>
    <style>
        .outer {
            background-color: grey;
            width: 1000px;
            height: 900px;
            display: flex;
            /*默认值，主轴不换行*/
            flex-wrap: nowrap;

            /*默认值，主轴从左到右*/
            flex-direction: row;

            /*默认值，主轴齐方式*/
            justify-content: center;



        }
        .inner {
            background-color: skyblue;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border: 1px solid black;

        }
        .inner2 {
            width: 300px;
            height: 300px;
            /*侧轴单独调整item对其方式，默认值是auto*/
            align-self: center;
        }


    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="outer">
    <div class="inner inner1">1</div>
    <div class="inner inner2">2</div>
    <div class="inner inner3">3</div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

水平垂直居中-方法二-flex自动margin

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>flex</title>
    <style>
        .outer {
            background-color: grey;
            width: 1000px;
            height: 900px;
            /*方法二：父容器开启弹性盒子*/
            display: flex;


        }
        .inner{
            background-color: skyblue;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border:1px solid black;
            /*子元素中设置自动外边距*/
            margin:auto;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="outer">
    <div class="inner inner1"></div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

水平垂直居中-方法三-margin计算

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>flex</title>
    <style>
        .outer {
            background-color: grey;
            width: 1000px;
            height: 900px;
            /* 解决margin塌陷 */
            overflow: hidden;


        }
        .inner {
            background-color: skyblue;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border: 1px solid black;
            /*(900-200)/2  即（父元素高度-子元素高度）/2 */
            margin: 350px auto;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="outer">
    <div class="inner inner1"></div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

水平垂直居中-方法四-定位

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title></title>
    <style>
        .outer {
            background-color: grey;
            width: 1000px;
            height: 900px;
            /* 给一个定位属性：作为inner的包含块：作为inner的第一个拥有position属性的祖先元素*/
            position: relative;

        }
        .inner {
            background-color: skyblue;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border: 1px solid black;

            /* 在包含块里居中 */
            /* 绝对定位：
                 脱离文档流
                 包含块：第一个拥有position属性的祖先元素作为参考，若都没有则为html元素
             */
            position:absolute;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            margin: auto;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="outer">
    <div class="inner inner1"></div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

复合属性flex

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title></title>
    <style>
        .outer {
            background-color: grey;
            width: 1000px;
            height: 900px;
            display: flex;
            /*默认值，主轴不换行*/
            flex-wrap: nowrap;

            /*默认值，主轴从左到右*/
            flex-direction: row;

            /*默认值，主轴齐方式*/
            justify-content: flex-start;

            /*默认值，侧轴单行对齐方式stretch拉伸,当items没有设置高度时*/
            /*align-items: stretch;*/
            /*默认值，侧轴多行对齐方式stretch拉伸,当items没有设置高度时*/
            /*align-content: stretch;*/


        }
        .inner {
            background-color: skyblue;
            width: 200px;
            height: 200px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border: 1px solid black;

            /*默认值，即使主轴有剩余也不拉伸*/
            flex-grow: 0;

            /*默认值，按计算缩小*/
            flex-shrink: 1;

            /*    简写flex110 可以拉伸，可以压缩，基准长度为0 */
            flex: 1;
        }
        .inner2 {
            width: 300px;
            height: 300px;
        /*    默认值，排序*/
            order: 0;
            /*侧轴单独调整item对其方式，默认值是auto*/
            align-self: auto;
        }


    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="outer">
    <div class="inner inner1">1</div>
    <div class="inner inner2">2</div>
    <div class="inner inner3">3</div>
</div>
</body>
</html>

基准长度flex-basis

伸flex-grow

缩flex-shrink

媒体查询

媒体特性

BFC

昨夜向左.火车向右">

Tomcat

发表于 2024-05-03 更新于 2025-04-14

环境搭建

  • Tomcat

    CATALINA_HOME
D:\software\tomcat\apache-tomcat-8.5.100
path
%CATALINA_HOME%\bin

  • startup

tomcat乱码解决

    <!-- server.xml
    -->
<Connector port="8080" protocol="HTTP/1.1"
               connectionTimeout="20000"
               redirectPort="8443"
               maxParameterCount="1000"
			   URIEncoding="UTF-8"
               />

logging.properties

#logging.properties
java.util.logging.ConsoleHandler.level = FINE
java.util.logging.ConsoleHandler.formatter = org.apache.juli.OneLineFormatter
#java.util.logging.ConsoleHandler.encoding = UTF-8
java.util.logging.ConsoleHandler.encoding = GBK

IDEA配置tomcat

昨夜向左.火车向右">

网络协议

发表于 2024-05-03 更新于 2024-05-12

环境搭建

  • Cisco Packet Tracer

客户端-服务器

网络互连模型

  • 1985年ISO（国际标准化组织）制定网络互连模型OSI（openSystemInterconnectReferenceModel）

请求过程

计算机通信基础

  • 需要得知目标IP

  • 最终根据MAC地址(网卡地址)输送到网卡

  • 网卡发现数据的目标MAC地址是自己则将数据传递给上一层处理，否则丢弃

  • 网线直连、同轴电缆、集线器、网桥、交换机连接的设备必须在同一广播域才能通信。

网桥

交换机

  • 相当于接口更多的网桥
  • 每一个接口都记录目标MAC地址

路由器

  • 可在不同网段间转发数据
  • 隔绝广播域
  • 计算机通信前会先判断目标主机和自己是否在同一网段，不同网段交由路由器转发
  • 网段计算：子网掩码&IP地址

Mac地址

  • MAC地址MediaAccessControlAddress有6字节
  • 全球唯一，固化在网卡ROM中，有IEEE802标准规定
  • 前3字节为组织唯一标识符OUI(Organizationally Unique Identifier)，有IEEE的注册管理机构分配给厂商
  • 后3个字节为网络接口标识符，有厂商自行分配

修改MAC地址

ARP广播

IP地址

  • InternetProtocolAddress:互联网上每一个主机都有一个IP地址

IP地址组成

IP地址分类

A类IP

B类IP

子网掩码的CIDR表示方法

参考

  • OUI查询
  • MAC地址查询
  • 子网掩码计算工具
昨夜向左.火车向右">

mavenHello

发表于 2024-05-01 更新于 2025-04-14

maven

  • 基于项目对象模型Project Object Model管理项目的构建过程和依赖关系

环境搭建

  • Maven下载

  • 环境变量

    <!--安装目录-->
MAVEN_HOME
<!--path-->
%MAVEN_HOME%\bin

  • 修改settings.xml

    <!--本地仓库maven_rep-->
<localRepository>D:\software\maven\maven_rep</localRepository>
      
<!--配置阿里云私服-->
<mirror>
  <id>aliyunmaven</id>
  <mirrorOf>*</mirrorOf>
  <name>阿里云公共仓库</name>
  <url>https://maven.aliyun.com/repository/public</url>
</mirror>
    <!-- java1.6版本 --> 
<profile>       
   <id>jdk-1.6</id>       
   <activation>       
	   <activeByDefault>true</activeByDefault>       
	   <jdk>1.6</jdk>       
   </activation>       
   <properties>       
	   <maven.compiler.source>1.6</maven.compiler.source>       
	   <maven.compiler.target>1.6</maven.compiler.target>       
	   <maven.compiler.compilerVersion>1.6</maven.compiler.compilerVersion>       
   </properties>       
</profile>

    项目中pom指定jdk1.6

    <build>  
    <plugins>  
        <plugin>  
            <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>  
            <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>  
            <version>2.0.2</version>  
            <configuration>  
                <source>1.6</source>  
                <target>1.6</target>  
            </configuration>  
        </plugin>  
    </plugins>  
</build>

  • 验证

    //自动下载缺省或更新配置文件和依赖到本地出库。
mvn help:system

IDEA创建maven的java工程

IDEA创建maven的web工程

设置maven在不联网的情况下使用本地插件

一般使用maven为我们提供好的骨架时，是需要联网的，配置这个，可以在没有网路的情况下，我们可以正常创建工程，并从之前已经使用过的工程中找到相应的骨架。

-DarchetypeCatalog=internal

IDEA热部署

  • 运行时自动编译

  • 引入devtools热部署

    </dependencies>
	<!--devtools热部署-->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-devtools</artifactId>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
            <optional>true</optional>
        </dependency>

</dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
				<artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
<!--                    开启热部署devtools-->
                    <fork>true</fork>
                </configuration>
			</plugin>


        </plugins>
    </build>
昨夜向左.火车向右">

Hello World

发表于 2024-03-24 更新于 2024-01-03

Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing

Run server

$ hexo server

More info: Server

Generate static files

$ hexo generate

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment

12345
© 2025 LuoTao
